descriptions.headline: Waterfront Escape Steps from the Gulf
descriptions.short_description: A bright, waterfront 4-bedroom retreat with a private dock and heated pool.
descriptions.description: Pelican Palms is a spacious waterfront home on a quiet canal just minutes from Fort Myers Beach. Enjoy a private heated pool, a boat dock, and an open-concept living area designed for group getaways.
descriptions.accommodations_detail: Primary suite with king bed and en-suite bath; two guest rooms with queen beds; bunk room for kids.
descriptions.features_description: Private heated pool, boat dock, and outdoor kitchen with a gas grill.
descriptions.location_description: Located on a quiet canal minutes from Fort Myers Beach and Times Square.
descriptions.location_other_activities: Nearby: Times Square, Lynn Hall Memorial Park, Bowditch Point Park.
descriptions.getting_there: From RSW airport, take San Carlos Blvd south for approximately 25 minutes.
descriptions.getting_around: A car or golf cart is recommended for getting around the island.
descriptions.owner_listing_story: We bought this home in 2015 to share the canal-front lifestyle we love with other families.
descriptions.why_purchased: We fell in love with the direct canal access and the boat dock.
descriptions.unique_benefits: Private heated pool and private boat dock with no bridges to the Gulf.
descriptions.guest_access: Keyless entry via smart lock; the door code is sent by text 24 hours before arrival.

listing.check_in_instructions: Use the smart lock code sent via email/text 24 hours before check-in.
listing.directions: Head west on San Carlos Blvd, cross the bridge onto Estero Island, and turn right on Pelican Way.
listing.house_manual: Trash pickup is Tuesday and Friday mornings; bins are on the side of the garage.
listing.internet_info: Network: PelicanPalms_5G. Password is provided in your check-in message.

reviews.title: Perfect waterfront getaway
reviews.body: We had an amazing week on the canal - the dock and pool were the highlight of the trip.
reviews.response: Thank you so much for staying with us!

reviews.title: Great dock access
reviews.body: Loved having our own boat slip right at the house.
